/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/simple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/simple_velocity_msg/msg/simple_velocity__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/vm/training/ros2_ws/src/build/simple_velocity_msg:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
